rule_metadata.name: PAS_TOOL_PHP_WEB_KIT
rule_metadata.description: PAS TOOL PHP WEB KIT FOUND

rules.rule_text:
rule PAS_TOOL_PHP_WEB_KIT
{
	meta:
		description = "PAS TOOL PHP WEB KIT FOUND"
		source = "https://www.us-cert.gov/security-publications/GRIZZLY-STEPPE-Russian-Malicious-Cyber-Activity"
		filetype = "PHP"

	strings:
		$php = "<?php"
		$base64decode = /\='base'\.\(\d+\*\d+\)\.'_de'\.'code'/
		$strreplace = "(str_replace("
		$md5 = ".substr(md5(strrev("
		$gzinflate = "gzinflate"
		$cookie = "_COOKIE"
		$isset = "isset"

	condition:
		( filesize > 20KB and filesize < 22KB ) and #cookie == 2 and #isset == 3 and all of them
}
